notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for south_korea. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: South Korea Short-Term Visit Visa and K-ETA

chunks.title: 中国护照韩国短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国大陆普通护照持有人短期赴韩国旅游通常应先核查韩国签证门户/Korean mission 的 C-3 短期访问或团体旅游签证要求，而不是默认 K-ETA。K-ETA 主要适用于免签/免签协定国家和地区的旅客；对不属于免签范围的旅客，仍需要申请相应韩国签证。

chunks.title: Korea C-3 short-term and Chinese group tourism
chunks.content: Korea Visa Portal lists short-term visa categories including Short-term Group Tourist (C-3-2) for Chinese group tourists who apply through designated travel agencies. For individual tourism, visiting relatives/friends, medical tourism, short study or business, the exact C-3 subtype and documents depend on the Korean mission or visa application centre with jurisdiction.

chunks.title: K-ETA scope and official site
chunks.content: K-ETA is Korea's electronic travel authorization for eligible visa-free travellers and is not a visa. The official site is k-eta.go.kr. Some visa-free nationalities have temporary K-ETA exemptions, but this does not help travellers who need a visa. VIZA AI should first determine passport nationality and whether the user is visa-exempt before mentioning K-ETA as the answer.

documents.title: South Korea Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: South Korea application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Use Korea Visa Portal or consular/VAC route for C-3 visitor visas; use K-ETA only when the traveller is eligible and visa-free. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.visa.go.kr/openPage.do?LANG_TYPE=EN&MENU_ID=10105. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: South Korea fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Korea visitor intake should collect identity, passport, nationality/residence, contact details, occupation, purpose, itinerary, address in Korea, host/inviter if any, funds, previous Korea travel/visa history, and immigration/criminal declarations.

chunks.title: South Korea supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: Common documents include application form, passport, photo, itinerary, accommodation or invitation, funds/employment evidence, family or business evidence where relevant, and residence/jurisdiction evidence. Workflow guardrails: VIZA must not confuse K-ETA with a visa. Route visa-required users to C-3/consular process and visa-exempt users to K-ETA only when eligible.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for south_korea.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.visa.go.kr/openPage.do?LANG_TYPE=EN&MENU_ID=10105

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- The sponsor (inviter) must download Visa application form (for the applicant) from “Application Status” on the Visa Portal, and send it to the applicant via email, or inform him/her of the number and expiry date of the confirmation of visa issuance.
- The applicant must receive Visa application form for the confirmation of visa issuance or its number (expiry date) from the sponsor in Korea in order to apply for his/her visa at the Korean Embassy or Consulate General.
- Confirmation of Visa issuance is valid for 3 months, and is effective for visa issuance just for once.

Travel plan and port fields:
- A single-entry or multiple-entry visa for eligible applicants of Diplomat(A-1), Government Official(A-2) Visa
- A single-entry visa (with 90 days of duration of stay or less), for eligible applicants of - Short-term News Coverage (C-1), Short-term General (C-3) and Short-term Employee (C-4)
- A multiple-entry visa (with 90 days of duration of stay or less) for eligible applicants of Short-term News Coverage (C-1) and Short-term General (C-3) Visa who are citizens of countries that have multiple-entry visa agreements with Korea.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- Application must be submitted by a foreigner or the sponsor on behalf of the foreigner
- sponsor (corporation/individual) - Confirmation Invitation (Visa portal)
- sponsor, Applicant - Confirmation of Results (Visa portal)

Purpose, occupation, work, and study fields:
- - Qualification : the applicant must be an expert in advanced science and technology and have an official employment recommendation letter (a.k.a.
- Short-term General (C-3-1) Visa for a prospective investor invited by a promotion agency of the Immigrant Investor Scheme for Public Business and his/her accompanying family members
- Business Visitor (General) (C-3-4) visa for an invitee of a domestic company

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
